national_cascade.title: National 95-95-95 cascade
national_cascade.note: Quarterly national cascade, 2023 Q2 to 2025 Q4. The third 95 uses suppression among PLHIV on ART.

regional_ladder.title: Regional cascade ladder
regional_ladder.note: Regions are ordered from smallest to largest average gap to the 95% target. Region 6 is closest overall; Region 12 is furthest away.

anomaly_board.title: Regional outliers and treatment leakage
anomaly_board.note: Residuals show which regions are above or below the fitted cascade pattern. Leakage uses the 2025 Q4 treatment-outcome snapshot.

historical_board.title: Historical burden and exposure shift
historical_board.note: Historical panels use annualized values and shade years outside the observed window rather than implying missing values.

key_populations_board.title: Key population sentinel panels
key_populations_board.note: All four panels share the same 2010 to 2025 x-axis. Shaded periods indicate years with no observed values for that specific series.
